chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No D-5927 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Priority 1. For order on office objection 2. For Hearing of Misc. No.24990/2021 3. For hearing of main case 10.10.2024. Syed Shoa un Nabi, Advocate for the Petitioners. Kazi Abdul Hameed Siddiqui, D.A.G. Mr. Mukesh Kumar G. Karara, Advocate for SSGCL along with Raja Love Kush, Deputy Manager Legal SSGC and Sajid Ali Channa and Muhammad Rizwan, Advocates. --------------- Through this Petition, the Petitioners have invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, seeking regularization of their contractual service with SSGCL. However, a larger Bench of this Court in C.P No. D-875 of 2020 and connected matters has already held that Article 199 of the Constitution cannot be invoked for such purpose in the absence of a statutory basis. Under the circumstances, the Petition stands dismissed along with the pending miscellaneous application. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PA
